response.title: Lead Manufacturing Engineer
response.description: Precision Manufacturing Inc. is seeking a Lead Manufacturing Engineer to oversee and enhance our production processes. The ideal candidate will lead a team of engineers and technicians to improve efficiency, reduce waste, and ensure high-quality standards. This is an exciting opportunity to play a key role in driving innovation and operational excellence in our manufacturing facility.

required_skills: Six Sigma certification (Green Belt or Black Belt)
Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., SolidWorks, AutoCAD)
Experience with PLC programming and troubleshooting
Knowledge of industry regulations (ISO, OSHA standards)
Ability to analyze production metrics and implement improvements
Familiarity with ERP systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle)
preferred_skills: Proficiency in data analysis tools (e.g., Minitab, Excel VBA)
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, or related field
